title: Campaign Strategy
shortSummary: Plan and execute a winning political campaign — from pre-selection through to election day. Covers targeting, messaging, field operations, digital strategy, and volunteer management.
whyItMatters: Campaigns are how democracy decides. A brilliant policy platform means nothing if you cannot run a disciplined, well-targeted campaign. Understanding campaign strategy is essential whether you are the candidate, the manager, or a key volunteer.
coreConcepts: Digital and social media campaign strategy
